sessions.summary: Level 13 season strategy: Duek Tier Up (83 OVR, Shooting 119), Cup 1st leg 4-0 W, FK/Captain reassigned, Malka Creativity 118 confirmed (SA decision reopened), Kovalio coaching for AMC, training optimized with World-Class Shooting Technique drill
outcomes: Cup 1st round 1st leg won 4-0 vs Galatasaray
FK taker changed to Duek, Captain to Malka
Kovalio sent to Focused Attacking x2 coach (Shooting 65→89-99)
Shooting Technique drill upgraded to World-Class
SA mechanics fully researched and saved to memory
Hard Workers sponsor task completed (20 pts)
blockers: MR replacement for Barda still needed (transfer market)

next: Cup 2nd leg tomorrow — try AMC formation
